low.prompt_text: Choose the correct word: 'She ___ to the lab every day.' (go/goes)
hints: Use present simple third person singular.

mid.prompt_text: Correct the sentence: 'The researchers has found a new signal'.
correct_answers: the researchers have found a new signal

high.prompt_text: Correct the sentence: 'Neither the signal nor the frequency were been identified yet'.
correct_answers: neither the signal nor the frequency has been identified yet
hints: Focus on the verb phrase form.
After 'neither ... nor', the verb agrees with the nearer subject.
